name: Kidnapped Girl
short_description: The main character, named Clive, considers himself a psychopath. He has long wanted to hurt someone. So Clive kidnapped a girl on his seventeenth birthday. But the victim was more complicated than he'd thought.
detailed_description:
The main character, named Clive, considers himself a psychopath. He has long wanted to hurt someone. So Clive kidnapped a girl on his seventeenth birthday. But the victim was more complicated than he'd thought.

A short romantic story with two endings.
Game duration: 0,5-2 hours.

This game is not suitable for children
or those who are easily disturbed.

English translation by "Catherine Chu"
